prompt_text: Shen Ci, a tall aristocratic young man from ancient China, cold and elegant, sharp long eyes, pale skin, high nose bridge, thin lips, black hair in a neat topknot with jade crown, wearing dark blue and black embroidered hanfu, restrained noble aura, subtle obsession and sorrow in his expression, shown in a close-up from a front-side angle on the right side of the frame; his gaze fixed toward the unseen coffin on the left, eyes slightly widened and staring, outer corners reddened, lower lashes damp, lips pressed into a tight line, delayed grief finally visible and real. prompt_text: Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, shown only through her still body inside the coffin; focus on her folded hands resting over plain white burial robes, motionless fingers and quiet cloth folds conveying absolute finality.
